suggestions.topic: EIP-8080 and EIP-8061 stage decisions for Hegotá
suggestions.rationale: Both EIPs have explicit two-week revisit timelines from ACDC #179 (May 28), making them due for decision at this call. EIP-8061 has implementation history since devnet-1 and intent to SFI; EIP-8080 has intent to DFI.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8148 (custom sweep threshold) review and Hegotá inclusion decision
suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDC #179 with explicit 'next ACDC' revisit. Client teams were asked to review details and bring data on affected Lido validator count. Currently at PFI stage, needs advancement decision.

suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam devnet-5 stability status and devnet-6 scoping
suggestions.rationale: Devnet-4 was unstable since May 20; devnet-5 launched as relaunch with no scope increase until two weeks of stability. Need status check on stability criteria and whether devnet-6 (with Builder API V4 changes) can be scoped.

suggestions.topic: PTC fork-choice testing readiness across clients
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #179 flagged potential cross-client PTC attestation bug with data-available flag handling. Action item for CL teams to notify Potuz when dual-deadline and honest-reorg features are implemented for testing remains open.

suggestions.topic: Hegotá headliner proposal window closure decision
suggestions.rationale: Window opened after April 16 with end date 'TBD based on Glamsterdam progress.' With devnet-5 status now clearer, need to determine if window should close or remain open pending further stability.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8025 (optional execution proofs) feedback and Hegotá consideration
suggestions.rationale: Presented at ACDC #178 with action for all teams to review updated PR #11604. No follow-up discussion found in #179, so feedback collection is pending.

suggestions.topic: EIP-7688 (SSZ stable containers) status and Hegotá path
suggestions.rationale: Remains CFI with no SFI until stable devnets achieved. Gas limit cap at 190M is temporary pending this EIP. Worth brief status check on whether devnet stability changes the timeline.
This call (#180) is trialing 11:00 UTC start (3 hours earlier). Need to collect feedback and decide whether to permanently adopt new time or revert to original schedule for #181.
